text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Even in this mood, I managed to hit the board
somehow.
choice_data_list: Thank all the work you put in.
Thank all the work you put in.

Approach the next one with your head held a
bit higher.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
What, you're saying I have this super solid
foundation or whatever?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Well, a whole lot of good it's done me.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Wow, why didn't I think of that? Look, if you
actually want me to be more optimistic or
whatever...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I know... I know I need to better my attitude.
